message:
test(vhs): Add VHS visual regression test infrastructure for dashboard TUI

Add VHS (Video Host Script) tape files for comprehensive visual regression
testing of the NTM dashboard component. This enables automated screenshot-based
verification of TUI rendering across different terminal configurations.

Test scenarios include:
- dashboard-basic.tape: Initial render and startup behavior verification
- dashboard-resize.tape: Tier transitions (mega/ultra/wide/split/narrow)
  with hysteresis testing to prevent visual flickering
- dashboard-navigation.tape: Tab navigation between panels and vim-style
  arrow key movement within panels
- dashboard-refresh.tape: Ticker auto-updates and manual refresh (r key)
- dashboard-minimum.tape: Graceful degradation at 80x24 and 40x10 sizes

All tests use Catppuccin Mocha theme for consistent visual appearance and
support the --demo flag for testing without real tmux sessions.

The README.md documents prerequisites (VHS, optional ImageMagick for
comparison), test execution workflow, and CI integration notes. Tests
gracefully skip when VHS is not installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+# VHS Visual Regression Tests
+
+This directory contains [VHS](https://github.com/charmbracelet/vhs) tape files for visual regression testing of the NTM dashboard.
+
+## Prerequisites
+
+Install VHS:
+```bash
+# macOS
+brew install charmbracelet/tap/vhs
+
+# Linux (via Go)
+go install github.com/charmbracelet/vhs@latest
+
+# Arch Linux
+yay -S vhs
+```
+
+For screenshot comparison, optionally install ImageMagick:
+```bash
+# macOS
+brew install imagemagick
+
+# Ubuntu/Debian
+sudo apt install imagemagick
+```
+
+## Running Tests
+
+### Run all visual regression tests:
+```bash
+./scripts/visual-regression.sh
+```
+
+### Run a specific test:
+```bash
+./scripts/visual-regression.sh dashboard-basic
+```
+
+### Update golden images:
+```bash
+./scripts/visual-regression.sh --update
+```
+
+### Run via Go test:
+```bash
+go test -v -run Visual ./tests/e2e/...
+```
+
+## Tape Files
+
+- **dashboard-basic.tape** - Basic dashboard rendering at startup
+- **dashboard-resize.tape** - Tier transitions when terminal is resized
+- **dashboard-navigation.tape** - Keyboard navigation between panels
+- **dashboard-refresh.tape** - Ticker updates and manual refresh
+- **dashboard-minimum.tape** - Rendering at minimum terminal sizes
+
+## Directory Structure
+
+```
+testdata/
+├── vhs/           # VHS tape files (test scripts)
+├── golden/        # Golden screenshots (expected results)
+└── screenshots/   # Current test screenshots (generated)
+```
+
+## Writing New Tests
+
+1. Create a new `.tape` file in `testdata/vhs/`
+2. Follow the VHS syntax: https://github.com/charmbracelet/vhs
+3. Use `Screenshot testdata/screenshots/<name>.png` for screenshots
+4. The main screenshot should match the tape name (e.g., `dashboard-basic.png`)
+5. Run `./scripts/visual-regression.sh --update <tape-name>` to create golden images
+
+## CI Integration
+
+Tests automatically skip if VHS is not installed, so CI environments without VHS will not fail. To enable visual regression in CI, install VHS in the test environment.

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+# Dashboard Basic Rendering Test
+# Tests that the dashboard renders correctly at startup
+
+Output testdata/screenshots/dashboard-basic.png
+
+Set FontSize 14
+Set Width 340
+Set Height 60
+Set Shell "bash"
+Set Theme "Catppuccin Mocha"
+
+# Start dashboard in demo mode (no real tmux sessions)
+Type "ntm dashboard --demo"
+Enter
+Sleep 2s
+
+# Take screenshot of initial render
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-basic-initial.png
+
+# Wait for any animations to settle
+Sleep 500ms
+
+# Final screenshot
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-basic.png

@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# Dashboard Minimum Size Test
+# Tests rendering at minimum terminal sizes
+
+Output testdata/screenshots/dashboard-minimum.png
+
+Set FontSize 14
+Set Shell "bash"
+Set Theme "Catppuccin Mocha"
+
+# Start at minimum standard terminal size 80x24
+Set Width 80
+Set Height 24
+
+Type "ntm dashboard --demo"
+Enter
+Sleep 2s
+
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-minimum-80x24.png
+
+# Even smaller (40x10 - extreme case)
+Set Width 40
+Set Height 10
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-minimum-40x10.png
+
+# Final screenshot at 80x24
+Set Width 80
+Set Height 24
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-minimum.png

@@ -0,0 +1,42 @@
+# Dashboard Navigation Test
+# Tests keyboard navigation between panels
+
+Output testdata/screenshots/dashboard-navigation.png
+
+Set FontSize 14
+Set Width 340
+Set Height 60
+Set Shell "bash"
+Set Theme "Catppuccin Mocha"
+
+Type "ntm dashboard --demo"
+Enter
+Sleep 2s
+
+# Initial state - pane list focused
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-nav-initial.png
+
+# Tab to next panel
+Tab
+Sleep 500ms
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-nav-tab1.png
+
+# Tab again
+Tab
+Sleep 500ms
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-nav-tab2.png
+
+# Shift+Tab back
+Ctrl+Shift+Tab
+Sleep 500ms
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-nav-back.png
+
+# Arrow key navigation within panel
+Down
+Sleep 300ms
+Down
+Sleep 300ms
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-nav-arrows.png
+
+# Final screenshot
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-navigation.png

@@ -0,0 +1,29 @@
+# Dashboard Refresh Test
+# Tests that the ticker updates and refresh works
+
+Output testdata/screenshots/dashboard-refresh.png
+
+Set FontSize 14
+Set Width 340
+Set Height 60
+Set Shell "bash"
+Set Theme "Catppuccin Mocha"
+
+Type "ntm dashboard --demo"
+Enter
+Sleep 2s
+
+# Initial state
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-refresh-t0.png
+
+# Wait for ticker to update (default 5s interval)
+Sleep 6s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-refresh-t1.png
+
+# Force refresh with 'r' key
+Type "r"
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-refresh-manual.png
+
+# Final screenshot
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-refresh.png

@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+# Dashboard Resize Test
+# Tests tier transitions when terminal is resized
+
+Output testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize.png
+
+Set FontSize 14
+Set Shell "bash"
+Set Theme "Catppuccin Mocha"
+
+# Start at mega width (340 cols)
+Set Width 340
+Set Height 60
+
+Type "ntm dashboard --demo"
+Enter
+Sleep 2s
+
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize-mega.png
+
+# Resize to ultra width (250 cols)
+Set Width 250
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize-ultra.png
+
+# Resize to wide width (210 cols)
+Set Width 210
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize-wide.png
+
+# Resize to split width (140 cols)
+Set Width 140
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize-split.png
+
+# Resize to narrow width (100 cols)
+Set Width 100
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize-narrow.png
+
+# Resize back to mega (test hysteresis - should not flicker)
+Set Width 340
+Sleep 1s
+Screenshot testdata/screenshots/dashboard-resize.png
